text:
Only one of them will be above want while others will
suffer poverty. Jupiter alongwith Venus offers him only one son. The other
children will pass away. Saturn-Mars conjunction on one side and Venus
Jupiter in the same house on the other side of Rahu-Ketu axis will involve the
native in a great calamity at 49 when Saturn enters Scorpio/Sagittarius in his
5th round beginning.
When Jupiter transits Aquarius and Leo the native will have gains and
promotions in service. Venus has to cross Rahu before he reaches Saturn. As
Rahu is with the fiery Sun, the native will not be happy inspite of good
earnings. All money will fritter away.
Saturn aspects Leo and its Lord the Sun is in 11th place to Saturn.
Hence, employment will be in a Government concern. As Mercury has Saturn
and Mars next to him, he will gain also by commission agency and acting as

112 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
a mediator.
Conjuncion of Saturn-Mars on one side and Venus-Jupiter on the other
side will make the native very weak.
